reviews.title: Good Replacement Band For Fitbit Sense
reviews.text:
The AK Silicone Band attached securely to my Fitbit Sense without any problems.
It fits my wrist perfectly and is very comfortable to wear. I've had it on for approximately a month with no issues. It's not as easy to put on my wrist as the original Fitbit band, but that is a minor issue.

I'm very happy that I purchased this replacement band.

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

reviews.title: So glad I found this one!
reviews.text: I am so happy with the way this looks. It doesn’t look a traditional smart watch. It is more stylish. Would purchase again

reviews.title: Looks great but a pain to navigate
reviews.text: I ordered this watch because I love the style. I don’t care for the styles of most smart watches I’ve seen.  This watch looks great, very stylish!!  It comes with a tool to allow you to adjust the band length which is very helpful.  It keeps time perfectly.  It counts your steps and monitors sleep quality. The heart rate and BP monitors seem to be accurate as they are right on with my normal numbers. It measures sleep quality.  The hours I sleep is accurate but I don't know how to tell if the deep vs. light sleep is correct.  I assume its based on heartrate which seems to be accurate.  I cannot get the female app to sync, however,  I don’t use this feature. The apps are a pain to navigate through but aside from the female app they work well. The best part of this watch aside from its ascetics is that the charge lasts four to five days.

description: This pre-owned or refurbished product has been professionally inspected and tested to work and look like new. How a product becomes part of Amazon Renewed, your destination for pre-owned, refurbished products: A customer buys a new product and returns it or trades it in for a newer or different model. That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.

reviews.title: Angry customer
reviews.text: So after receiving these items on March 29, 2021, it took 5 hrs to charge, the headphone jack doesn't even fit the watch!  On top of that my daughter plays on it for 15 mins and it dies!  She wore it to play on it and the wrist band broke!  I'm not happy at all and will never be buying this brand ever again!  It wouldn't even turn on right away after charging! The headphones are absolutely the worst thing ever ! I plugged them in to my phone and all we heard was high pitched screeching!  I'm not asking for my money back, I'm just warning others to be careful!  Complete false advertising!

reviews.title: Watch is good, not great with mybphone
reviews.text:
The watch is great. Synched quickly with the app and I like the number of different face options offered. The battery life is also strong and it charges quickly.
Things I didn't like. If you touch the face it quickly unlocks and scrolls through the menus. So when I cross my arms I can mess up the watch, it needs a better lock. The app didn't synch all options to my watch/phone. So, I couldn't track sleep, heartrate and other things.
Maybe if I have a better phone?

reviews.title: Kids love it
reviews.text: It is a generic version of a smart watch but the kids don’t realize it as it works almost exactly as the real thing. It tells the time, lets you make and receive calls and text and you download the app just like you would with the real thing. It’s easy to set up. Comes with a charging cord. Connects to any phone. #FoundItOnAmazon

reviews.title: Great Apple alternative!
reviews.text: Got this for my mom, here it is next to my Apple Watch, it has pretty much all the same features as the Apple at about a quarter of the price. The battery lasts all day and seems to be on par with the battery life of my watch. The app is easy to use and my mom loves it!

reviews.title: Awesome Smart Watch
reviews.text:
For the money, this is an awesome smart watch that has some of the same popular features as that “fruit” brand.
The watch was packaged securely in a box and included a User Manual and a “How to Connect with the smart watch” brochure.

My watch was received with 46% battery life and did not need to be charged immediately, but I noticed that the charge cord is magnetic and attaches easily to the back of the watch.

I read the instructions and powered on the watch. I downloaded the app and proceeded to pair, referred to as “bind” in the manual. The smart watch paired effortlessly with my iPhone 13. Other than pairing or unpairing, the user manual doesn’t cover much else, but I found the watch use to be intuitive. I do think a more detailed user manual would be helpful to explain navigating and swipe direction of the screens.

The watch has many functions and I was pleasantly surprised that the watch provided a “Siri connection” and performed flawlessly. I compared the blood pressure and oxygen sensors to my individual monitors to check accuracy. Surprisingly, the watch is pretty accurate.

As I mentioned earlier, I started using the watch with 46% battery life and wore the watch for approximately 25 hours before I received a low battery alert.

This is a great buy and so much so, that within hours of using my watch, I ordered another one for my husband.

reviews.title: Like it was made by Fitbit!
reviews.text:
I love this strap it is so pretty and such a value for the money. It looks like it cost way more. The little kit it came with to attach it to the Fitbit and to remove extra links was so handy and easy to use. It attached with no trouble at all.

The only issue I had with it was that the rose gold color is slightly off from the Fitbit, but when wearing it, it’s not next to it directly so you can’t really tell. It’s not enough to bother me or take a star off but it could be for some.

reviews.title: Surprised at the comfort and beauty of the band.
reviews.text:
I've only had it on for a few hours, but I love it. The colors, black, pink on the resin look so rich and shiny. And it's a comfortable fit. I did have to take out 2 tabs to get a snug fit. Taking out the tabs wasn't difficult after figuring out the way the tool that came with it. Can't say the instructions were the best, but I figured it out.
I always got the magnetic mesh band in rose gold, but it always discolored and no matter what i tried I couldn't get it cleaned.
This is why I tried a new band. A review prompt gave suggestions of different things to comment on. One of the suggestions was a mobile app. I have no idea what that had to do with the band. Maybe someone knows and can let me know.
UPDATE:
I've been wearing it 24 hours a day, except when showering or recharging the watch. NO discloration, no running of colors (bracelet) and it doesn't get dirty looking like the metalic bands. I'm going to buy another one, just in case something happens to this. So worth the money.

reviews.title: Nice looking but---
reviews.text:
Just received yesterday so can't comment on accuracy yet. Got watch set up through app with no problems. Then the maddening part-One of reasons I ordered this watch was watch face on Amazon pictures. Well, I scrolled down through all the faces on the app 4 times and the shown watch face was not even there for download-What the hell!!!!! I've ordered 6 or 7 smart watches and this is the first one without magnetic charging cable. Has this plastic thingy at end of cord you have to push watch down into in order to charge. Don't like this at all. Haven't decided whether to keep or not but not off to a good start.
After a few days another problem. Battery charge on watch shows 100% all the time even after 2 days of wearing. Impossible for battery level not to go down somewhat if not a lot. Returning.

reviews.title: Cheap watch with premium features!
reviews.text:
I own several smart watches only because I like different styles. I have to say this one is very stylish and elegant. Works very well and has tons of features. The watch band feels strong and durable.

Some of the reading features such as the blood pressure monitor is not 100 percent accurate but pretty close compared to a cuff system.

Battery last a few days before needing a charge again. It’s also IP68, has music control once paired to your phone, heart rate monitor, blood oxygen readings, call & text notifications, and so much more!

If you are looking for a smart watch that would not break the bank, then this is it! Go and get yourself one of these today! It’s highly recommended!

reviews.title: does what it's supposed to
reviews.text:
*edit: I've found a con and it bugged me enough to update my review. If your phone is on "Do not disturb" and you leave your phone on at night for emergency calls, the watch still vibrates with every text, regardless of whether they're on your emergency list. This is annoying when you're a light sleeper and you get a text for go cart racing or Dairy Queen at 4 am. I'm assuming it would still go off with a call as well.

I have a Garmin Vivofit that for some reason the notification vibrations will work for a couple months, then stop working for a while, then randomly start working again. I was sick of this, and went looking for something not too expensive and found this. I'm still getting used to it, but it vibrates when I get a call or text, so I'm happy so far. The band is very flexible and comfortable, which is nice, since my Vivofit band was a little stiff.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price.
reviews.text: After buying the earlier brands of Fitbit which I loved. I bought myself a Luxe on sale for $100 last December 2021. It didn’t record anything accurately and just didn’t function the way it should. CS was if no help. I switched to Amazfit!  This is a great watch, the battery has lasted over a week. It accurately tells time, my heart rate, steps and I love this watch. It’s great and is so light on my wrist!!

reviews.title: Terrible smart watch, inaccurate and waste of time/money
reviews.text: After 5 months of use I’m done with this. It seems to be getting less accurate every workout. It can’t even get step counts correct. The accuracy of the heart beat monitoring varies too. The sleep monitor is often wrong about awake times so I don’t believe the other sleep data either. The only thing I can believe with this watch is the time of day.

reviews.title: Good budget watch if you don't need always-on display
reviews.text: Overall, this is a very reasonably priced watch with a lot of functionality. However, the fact that it doesn't have the always-on screen option was a deal breaker for me and I had to replace it with one of their other models.

reviews.title: Did not like this nearly as much as my original amazfit bip watch
reviews.text:
I bought an Amazfit Bip watch a year or more ago and have really been enjoying it The app tracks all my cycling trips and the sleep monitoring is useful. Iam really a big fan of the long battery life of the older model.

This watch has a 9 day battery life which is not nearly as long as the 30 days of the original watch.

This watch meausres blood oxygen levels but taking the measurement requires holding your wrist it the right position and takes much longer that the finger tip device Ihave.

I did not exhaustively evaluate the new app that came with this phone but it did not look nearly as good as the original app.

reviews.title: Seems nice
reviews.text:
Seems like a nice watch. It has a standard user interface for a smart watch.

I like the design and think it’s nice. Seems to have the basic functionality you’d expect for a smart watch and using it for workouts

I like the design and think that it seems nice

reviews.title: Works well for step counting and can measure heartrate upon request. Otherwise less than stellar
reviews.text:
This generally works well enough for exercise purposes. I didn't get the "dangerous app warning" on my iPhone, though I did get a warning that if I use the watch to display messages, then the app has access to all my contacts and the text of all my messages. I doubt I'm a target for Chinese spying so I chose to ignore that, but it's still worth noting.

I love that it's waterproof, other watch faces are available (though I couldn't figure out how to restore the original, more-helpful one without doing a full factory reset), it tracks steps and sleep, plus it's able to measure heartrate and blood pressure. Mine sometimes tells me the weather, but only immediately after connecting to my Google account on my phone; otherwise it just says "unknown" (and honestly, if I have to click extra buttons on my phone, I can just check the weather there). It has a music playback control, but I couldn't get that to work. It also theoretically connects to my phone and lets me enter a phone number, but I couldn't click "dial" so that bit felt more like a child's toy, where you pretend to call a phone but don't actually do it. But since I use this for exercise more than connectivity, I'm OK with that.

Some things are less than stellar, like their heart rate screen always shows a default chart (I don't think it ever lets you create your own heart rate chart)... and it shows a heartrate from 120-150 ALWAYS, which catches me off guard when I've been sitting at my desk for 2 hours. But I learned it's just a concept; there is no real *graph of my heartrate that I can find, just current / min / max that I can see from my phone. Or I can click "measure" to get my instant heartrate on my phone (good while exercising). Blood pressure can sometimes be measured from your phone (though it takes 1-4 minutes for some reason), and sometimes that screen disappears completely; I haven't yet figured out the pattern

It doesn't seem to measure many things other than steps automatically; you have to select each one when you're wanting to see it. Soooooooo all told it's solidly mediocre. It's good for counting steps, manually checking heartrate, and manually checking blood pressure (very slowly) on occasion; otherwise it's a lot weaker than most smart phones

reviews.title: just what I was hoping for
reviews.text: It did not come with extra screws, which was a bummer.  However I didn't end up needing them, so it worked out.  The new band was incredibly tricky to get on the fit bit itself, I had to enlist my husband's help.  Between the two of us, we managed to get it on.  It didn't help that the holes didn't perfectly line up and were not drilled out completely on the band, luckily the material is stretchy enough that we could work with it/around it.  I would buy it again if I had to.

reviews.title: Do not buy
reviews.text: I would give ZERO stars if I could. Battery life is a joke. Only lasts two days. Doesn't stay linked to phone. Watch hardly ever displays time unless I push a button. Wish I could send it back and get a full refund.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: I like amount of faces I can use from the app.  I also like that I can set it to vibrate when I get calls.  I do not use it for messaging.  Good value.

title: HAYUL Elastic Bands Compatible with Fitbit Inspire 2/ Inspire/Inspire HR for Women Men, Stretchy Fabric Soft Nylon Loop Band for Inspire Fitness Tracker, Skin-Friendly Replacement Wristband Accessory
features: COMPATIBILITY-- HAYUL Elastic nylon band compatible with fitbit Inspire/ Inspire 2/ Inspire HR fitness tracker. Please check your device model before purchasing.

SOFT&COMFORTABLE-- The stretchy band is made of high quality elastic fabric. It is comfortable to wear on wrist. The material is breathable and soft, which means you could wear it to sleep but feel like there’s nothing. Even kids could wear it with no worry.

ONE SIZE FITS ALL-- HAYUL Elastic fabric band fits for 5.3 inch-8.3 inch wrists. Loop design and the adjustable buckle allows you to adjust the length according to your wrist. The stretchy nylon cloth will wrap around your wrist but won’t make you feel tight.

STYLISH DESIGN-- The colorful elastic cloth band has stylish pattern design. The pattern makes the band looks more vivid and creative. The stylish elastic band is suitable for many occasions, no matter daily occasions or formal occasions.

EASY TO INSTALL-- The stretchy band is super easy to install. Just press the spring upside, then the band could connect with your Inspire tightly. Loop design makes it easy to wear and when you wear it, you won’t worry about it will fall.

reviews.title: Big upgrade over the original
reviews.text:
Feels great, doesn't leave marks on my skin which the fitbit one did. Only had to adjust it once, taking it off/on is like a rubber band.
Also I really like the way the metal looks for where it meets the fitbit

reviews.title: Finally a comfortable stretchy band
reviews.text: This watch band, that I have for my FitBit Inspire 2 is just what I was looking for. I hated the band that came with it.  I tried another buckle, cloth band, which was ok, but still a challenge to take on and off of my wrist.  This band is easy to attach to the Fit bit watch, and the length is adjustable (which I think is unusual for a slip-on stretchy band.  I even am ok with the multi color.  It makes it easy to pair up with lots of tops.  It can be adjusted in length to most everyone's wrist.  I have a very small wrist (short woman here) and I was able to make it small enough for me. But there is also a lot of room for expansion.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text: Very cute but not durable at all! It’s already stretched out😢

reviews.title: Your “cake pants” band
reviews.text: This is super comfortable. I’ve got a few bands at this point. Resin (oooh, pretty). Leather (old school charm). Canvas (slick). Silicone, of course (modern). This one is like putting on your cake pants after Thanksgiving Dinner. It’s not the prettiest but it’s just fine. More than fine. You can live (too much?) in this thing…

reviews.title: great bands, they do take in sweat smell though
reviews.text: first bands to not give me a blister!! they do start to smell though with sweat, have to wash it frequently.

reviews.title: Eh...
reviews.text:
They fit well. Drivers were a nice item have include. The band keeps are what's keeping this from a 5 star review. They don't keep well, and slide allover.

If you're buying these for a Garmin device, and just for the keepers, you can get replacement keepers for free through their website with your device serial number.

reviews.title: It fits Garmin Approach S20 Golf Watch PERFECTLY!!!
reviews.text: The "Baaletc for Garmin" Approach S20 colorful wristband is easy to install as the necessary tools are included. The band is lightweight, comfortable & stylish. A Garmin representative gave the following part number (010-12361-01) needed that would fit this golf watch & recommended Amazon. This band fit perfectly. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Good watch
reviews.text: Battery life u is good ,

reviews.title: Amazing Feature Packed Smart Watch at a Spectacular Cost
reviews.text:
This VALYV K22 Military Sport Watch is packed with an amazing number of smart features and provided seamless integration with my Samsung smart phone. The display is crystal-clear, and the audio capability and volume are very impressive. In general, it’s a very handsome watch and has a very intuitive user interface. The price is unbelievably low in comparison to some of the other smart watches on the market.
I especially enjoy the built-in fitness, activity, and sports tracking features which have already proven to be invaluable while training at the gym as well as general health monitoring during my activity throughout the day.
This watch charges quickly using the included USB magnetically connected cable and the battery is long lasting once charged. The user interface is customizable through the app – I preferred the default one that it shipped with… but there are MANY other options to choose from.
I summary, after spending many years not even wearing a watch… I am very happy with this purchase and can definitely recommend the purchase of this useful product to others.

reviews.title: Really great for the price!
reviews.text: I don’t spend a lot of money on things like this so I didn’t know what to expect since it’s not $300+… it’s not bad for the price! It works well, the stats seem fairly accurate, except the blood pressure which is always showing ridiculously good (I wish)!! I have high blood pressure and this watch has me at 117/ 68 most of the time. Other then that the only problem I have is the charge! It has a cable with 2 tiny magnets, you have to line them up just so and as soon as you’ve got it, it pops off!!

reviews.title: Es muy bonito
reviews.text: Mi dinero  esta garantizado

reviews.title: Works well as described.
reviews.text: It really helps keeping track of all of your health concerns. I highly recommend this product
